title: Cipher Mining November 2024 Operational Update - Fleet Upgrade Progress
text: Bitcoin Production: BTC Mined: 202. BTC Sold: 234. BTC Holdings (end of month): 1,383 (includes ~258 BTC pledged as collateral). Mining Infrastructure: Deployed Mining Rigs: 76,000. Month-End Operating Hash Rate: 12.0 EH/s. Fleet Efficiency: 20.8 J/TH. Key Operational Notes: Leadership indicated that by year-end, we expect to complete Odessa upgrade, giving Cipher one of most efficient fleets of mining rigs in industry. Black Pearl data center development remained progressing toward Q2 2025 energization target. Cipher finalized acquisition of 100 MW Stingray site in November, slated for 2026 energization. Company's total development portfolio across 11 sites now represents over 2.6 GW of potential capacity.
